name: all-the-blame
description: AI tooling aware git blame. See git blame information in the status bar or in-line, with automatic co-author resolution for bot-attributed commits.

scripts.pretest-integration: pnpm run build && pnpm run compile-integration-tests && node test/integration/setup-fixture.mjs

untrustedWorkspaces.description: All the Blame (extension) executes command line tools in the workspace

commands.title: All the Blame: Show quick info
All the Blame: View last change online
All the Blame: Copy hash to clipboard
All the Blame: Copy tool URL to clipboard
All the Blame: Git show for current line hash

colors.description: Inline git blame message. Defaults to editorCodeLens.foreground

enumDescriptions: Show a info message with a short summary of the commit
Attempt to directly open the tool URL
Run git show in a vscode terminal view
Copies the hash of the current line's commit to the clipboard

alltheblame.statusBarPositionPriority.description: Priority where the status bar view should be placed

alltheblame.inlineMessageEnabled.description: Show blame information inline (next to the code)

alltheblame.inlineMessageMargin.description: The amount of margin between line and inline blame view

alltheblame.currentUserAlias.markdownDescription: Replaces `${author.name}` and `${committer.name}` when the git config `user.email` matches the author's or committer's email address.

alltheblame.remoteName.description: The name of the git remote used to build the URL.

alltheblame.commitUrl.markdownDescription: The link to an online tool to view a commit (use `${hash}` for the commit hash).

alltheblame.ignoreWhitespace.markdownDescription: Ignore whitespace changes when blaming (`-w` flag)

alltheblame.pluralWebPathSubstrings.markdownDescription: An array of substrings that, when present in the git origin URL, adds an extra _s_ to the url after _commit_ in `alltheblame.commitUrl`'s default behavior

alltheblame.delayBlame.description: This setting adds a delay (in milliseconds) before the blame is displayed

alltheblame.parallelBlames.description: Limit allowed parallel git blame process count

alltheblame.maxLineCount.markdownDescription: Will skip blaming files with **more** lines than this value

alltheblame.revsFile.markdownDescription: List of refs-file names to look for relative to the closest `.git`-folder. The first file in the list that is accessible will be used with the `-S`-argument in `git blame`.

enumDescriptions: Do not show extended hover information
Show extended hover information for both inline and status bar
Show extended hover information only for inline view
Show extended hover information only for the status bar item

alltheblame.detectMoveOrCopyFromOtherFil.markdownDescription: Detect lines moved or copied from other files when blaming (`-C` flag)
enumDescriptions: Do not look for copied or moved lines
Looks for copies from other files in the commit that modified the line (slow) (`-C`)
Looks for copies from other files in the commit that creates the file (slower) (`-C -C`)
Looks for copies from other files in any commit (slowest) (`-C -C -C`)
